source_pr.title: *: add support for removed sysvars
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Problem Summary:

Previously there has been no way to remove a sysvar which has been deprecated. This introduces a new "removed" feature, and adds the variables `TiDBEnableGlobalTemporaryTable` and `TiDBSlowLogMasking` to it.

### What is changed and how it works?

Proposal: From https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/28773

What's Changed:

The system variables `tidb_enable_global_temporary_table` and `tidb_slow_log_masking` have been removed from this version of TiDB. Temporary tables is now a GA feature, and no longer requires a server option to enable, and `tidb_slow_log_masking` has been deprecated for several versions of TiDB in favor of `tidb_redact_log` instead.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [x] Breaking backward compatibility

The motivation to clean up `TiDBSlowLogMasking` is that it shows a warning everytime `SHOW [GLOBAL] VARIABLES` is executed, which looks messy. It has been deprecated for several versions of TiDB.

The motivation to clean up `tidb_enable_global_temporary_table` is that it was experimental, and does thus does not have a stability guarantee. But the introduction of the "removed sysvars" feature means that the compatibility breaking is only minimal.

Still, we should not cherry pick these PRs.

Documentation

- [x] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [x] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

```release-note
The system variables `tidb_enable_global_temporary_table` and `tidb_slow_log_masking` have been removed from this version of TiDB. Temporary tables is now a GA feature, and no longer requires a server option to enable, and `tidb_slow_log_masking` has been deprecated for several versions of TiDB in favor of `tidb_redact_log` instead.
```
